name: Institute of Hotel Management Catering Technology & Applied Nutrition Bhubaneswar
affiliations: Government Affiliated to IGNOU, New Delhi

courses.title: BSc - Hospitality and Hotel Administration
courses.name: Bachelor of Science [B.Sc] (Hospitality and Hotel Administration)

courses.title: Post Graduate Diploma - Accommodation Operations & Management
courses.name: Post Graduate Diploma in Accommodation Operations & Management

courses.title: Craftsmanship course - Food and Beverage Service
courses.name: Craftsmanship course in Food and Beverage Service

scholarships.name: Central Sector Scholarship for SC Students
scholarships.eligibility: SC students in 1st semester of 3-year B.Sc in Hospitality & Hotel Administration with parents’ income below INR 4.5 LPA, limited to five students

scholarships.name: Central Sector Scholarship for ST Students
scholarships.eligibility: ST students in 1st semester of 3-year B.Sc in Hospitality & Hotel Administration with parents’ income below INR 4.5 LPA, limited to two students

scholarships.name: Central Sector Scholarship for Disability Students
scholarships.eligibility: Disability students in 3-year B.Sc in Hospitality & Hotel Administration with parents’ income not exceeding INR 6.0 LPA, limited to two students

scholarships.name: Merit Cum Means Scholarship
scholarships.eligibility: Highest percentage in each semester among eligible candidates
